note: Views Data Export is configured entirely inside a View (no admin settings page) and adds a display/style plus a Drush command; all cases are `recipe` (response-graded), grounded in the module's agent docs.

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 site with Views Data Export installed, I want a View to produce a downloadable file instead of an HTML page. Which Views display type do I add to the View? Name it.
evals.expected_output: Add the "Data export" display (machine name data_export, built on REST export) to the View.

evals.prompt: I added a Data export display to a View and want to offer CSV output, but CSV is not available as a format. Which module does Views Data Export require for CSV export?
evals.expected_output: CSV output requires the csv_serialization module (drupal/csv_serialization).

evals.prompt: In the Data export display's Format (style) settings on this Drupal site, which output file formats can I choose from? List them.
evals.expected_output: The data_export style supports csv, xml, json, and xls/xlsx (XLS needs xls_serialization).

evals.prompt: I need to export tens of thousands of rows from a View to a file without running out of memory using Views Data Export. Which display option enables this, and what value do I set?
evals.expected_output: Set export_method to `batch` (tunable with export_batch_size and export_limit) so large result sets are processed in batches.

evals.prompt: I want to run a Data export display headless from the CLI (for cron) on this Drupal site. Give the Drush command, including its alias, and the arguments it takes.
evals.expected_output: drush views_data_export:views-data-export <view_name> <display_id> [arguments] (alias `vde`), e.g. drush vde my_view data_export_1.

evals.prompt: When running the Views Data Export Drush command, I want the generated export written to a specific file on disk instead of printed to stdout. Which option do I pass?
evals.expected_output: Pass --output-file=<path> (relative to the Drupal webroot); add --force to overwrite an existing file. Without it, results print to stdout.

evals.prompt: In a custom module on this Drupal site, I want to modify each row just before Views Data Export writes it to the export file. Which hook do I implement? Name it.
evals.expected_output: Implement hook_views_data_export_row_alter(&$row, $result, $view) to transform each row before serialization.

evals.prompt: A user reports they can only download the Views Data Export files they generated themselves, not exports created by other users. Is this expected, and where is that enforced?
evals.expected_output: Expected: downloads are access-checked in hook_file_access(), restricting a generated export file to the user who created it.
